name: Temple
description: This is the northern end of a large temple whose scale suggests importance long after purpose became abstract. An ancient inscription covers the east wall, arranged like a prayer but structured with the precision of a directive. Beneath it, a staircase leads downward, implying compliance rather than contemplation. The west wall is solid granite, allowing no negotiation. To the north, massive marble pillars frame an exit that feels ceremonial by habit alone. Near the center of the space rests a small brass bell, placed where someone clearly expected acknowledgment before proceeding.

interactables.name: brass bell
interactables.description: A small brass bell, tarnished but intact. It looks like it has been rung in places where sound was the polite option.
